things.name: Bock Casemates
things.description: UNESCO World Heritage 17km network of underground tunnels carved into the rock over 400 years

things.name: Grand Ducal Palace
things.description: Late Renaissance palace in the heart of the old town, official residence of the Grand Duke

things.name: Notre-Dame Cathedral
things.description: Early Baroque cathedral with the revered Our Lady of Luxembourg statue

things.name: Adolphe Bridge
things.description: Elegant 1903 arch bridge spanning the Petrusse valley with views of the old town

things.name: MUDAM Luxembourg
things.description: Grand Duke Jean Museum of Modern Art in a striking I.M. Pei building

things.name: Chemin de la Corniche
things.description: Panoramic clifftop promenade dubbed 'Europe's most beautiful balcony'

things.name: Pfaffenthal Elevator
things.description: Free public panoramic elevator connecting the upper and lower city

things.name: Grund District
things.description: Picturesque lower town along the Alzette river with bars and riverside walks

things.name: National Museum of History and Art
things.description: Archaeology, decorative arts and fine art from Gallo-Roman times to today

things.name: Vianden Castle
things.description: Day trip to one of Europe's finest Gothic-Romanesque castles above the Our river
